[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101001011 6
1 0001111101 6
2 1100011101 6
3 0011101010 5
4 0110010001 4
5 1110010001 5
6 0010111100 5
7 1000011010 4

01 10 1110100000 4
12 21 1010100000 3
23 32 1001000000 2
34 43 1100000001 3
45 54 0010010000 2
56 65 0000011000 2
67 76 1000011010 4 match 7
70 07 1011001000 4

02 20 1011100000 4
13 31 1100000001 3
24 42 1010010000 3
35 53 0000001000 1
46 64 1000010000 2
57 75 0010011000 3
60 06 1000001000 2
71 17 1010000000 2

03 30 1101001000 4
14 41 1110000001 4
25 52 0010110000 3
36 63 1000001010 3
47 74 1010010000 3
50 05 0010101100 4
61 16 1000000000 1
72 27 1011010000 4

04 40 1110000000 3
15 51 0010100000 2
26 62 1000010000 2
37 73 1001001010 4
